content_body:
A “boutique” is defined as a small, specialized shop that caters to an individual's needs in a more intimate, personalized environment. At Tea Tree's Boutique Spa, they offer the same professional services and amenities as a larger spa with a more tranquil, relaxing atmosphere.

Their primary goal is to promote healing and wellness through soothing massage therapy for residents and visitors of all ages. Their staff are state-licensed and nationally certified in Massage Therapy with nearly two decades of experience, have the knowledge and expertise to perform a wide variety of modalities, and can design a specific treatment to fit your individual needs.

Tea Tree’s specializes in creating a unique Spa Day for the ladies. Their “Girlfriend’s Gatherings” of four or more offer complimentary refreshments in the Tearoom, where you can spend quality time with your friends in your own private relaxation area. 

If you would prefer to stay in and not have to travel, their therapists are available to make Cabin Calls so you can relax in the privacy of your rental cabin and enjoy the beautiful mountain views!
title: Tea Tree's Boutique Spa
